criteria.description: The artifact loads in a real browser preview without a blank screen or fatal runtime error.
Console output is free of uncaught exceptions, missing modules, and broken asset failures.
The primary user flow works after a fresh load and visibly changes app state.
The UI remains usable across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewport sizes without incoherent overlap or horizontal overflow.
The run report records preview, console, viewport, interaction, and screenshot evidence.
